name: Filesystem Server
description: Read and write files with configurable access controls. Supports reading, writing, searching, and directory listing.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Local filesystem access only within configured allowed directories.

name: Fetch Server
description: Retrieve web content by fetching URLs and converting HTML to markdown for easy consumption by LLMs.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Outbound network access only. Converts fetched content to markdown.

name: Git Server
description: Interact with Git repositories including cloning, committing, branching, diffing, and viewing history.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Requires filesystem and network access for remote operations.

name: GitHub Server
description: Interact with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, branches, and search via the GitHub API.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Personal access token required. Network access limited to GitHub API.

name: Slack Server
description: Interact with Slack workspaces to read messages, post updates, manage channels, and search conversations.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Bot token required. Network access limited to Slack API.

name: SQLite Server
description: Query and manage SQLite databases with read/write support, schema introspection, and business intelligence memo generation.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Local database access only.

name: PostgreSQL Server
description: Connect to PostgreSQL databases for querying, schema inspection, and data manipulation.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Network access limited to PostgreSQL wire protocol.

name: Puppeteer Server
description: Control a headless Chrome browser for web scraping, screenshots, form filling, and automated testing.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Launches headless Chrome subprocess. Network access for page navigation.

name: Brave Search Server
description: Perform web and local searches using the Brave Search API with support for pagination and filtering.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. API key required. Network access limited to Brave Search API.

name: Google Maps Server

scan_summary: No issues found. Google Maps API key required. Network access limited to Google Maps API.

name: Memory Server

scan_summary: No issues found. Local file-based knowledge graph. No network access.

name: Sequential Thinking Server

author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Pure computation, no filesystem or network access.

name: Time Server

author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Pure computation, no filesystem or network access.
